shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Optional subtle lift on main panel cards (shadow-sm).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for focus rings and color shifts.

motion.name: spin
motion.purpose: Loading spinner on search button — disable under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main search action — ink fill, icon + label.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary" type="button"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>Buscar</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1rem; background: #18181b; color: #fafafa; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #18181b; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; } .ds-btn-icon { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-outline" type="button"><svg class="ds-btn-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="2" x2="5" y1="12" y2="12"/><line x1="19" x2="22" y1="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="2" y2="5"/><line x1="12" x2="12" y1="19" y2="22"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="7"/></svg>Usar minha localização</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 1rem; background: #ffffff; color: #09090b; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f4f4f5; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fff, 0 0 0 4px #18181b; } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: City Input
components.description: Search field with leading map-pin icon.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; flex: 1; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 0.75rem; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #71717a; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 2.75rem; padding: 0 0.75rem 0 2.5rem; background: #ffffff; color: #09090b; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.5rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #18181b; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(24, 24, 27, 0.2); }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Main search and results panel container.
components.html: Busca
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; color: #09090b; } .ds-card-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; }

components.name: Weather Metric Cell
components.description: Individual metric readout within results grid.
components.html:
Umidade

72%
components.css: .ds-metric { border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 1rem; } .ds-metric-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-metric-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #71717a; } .ds-metric-icon { display: inline-flex; padding: 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; background: #fef3c7; color: #d97706; } .ds-metric-value { margin-top: 1rem; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #09090b; }

components.name: API Status Pill
components.css: .ds-status-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(244, 244, 245, 0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-status-dot { width: 0.625rem; height: 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: #22c55e; } .ds-status-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #71717a; }

components.name: Error Alert
components.html: Não foi possível carregar o clima para esta cidade.
components.css: .ds-error { margin-top: 1.25rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #b91c1c; background: #fef2f2; border: 1px solid #fecaca; border-radius: 0.375rem; }

narrative.overview: This system treats the weather dashboard like a well-calibrated instrument panel: readings are legible at a glance, chrome stays quiet, and every surface earns its place. The aesthetic is cool-neutral zinc on true white — not warm cream, not sky gradients, not decorative weather theatrics.
keyCharacteristics: Cool zinc neutrals on #ffffff — restrained, AAA-contrast-ready
System sans-serif stack — no decorative type pairing
Flat tonal depth via borders and bg-card / bg-secondary tints, not shadows
Uppercase tracked labels used sparingly (section headers only)
Weather accent (#f59e0b) reserved for semantic weather iconography
Portuguese UI copy; universal tool-like structure

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Weather amber appears on icons and small semantic highlights only. It never tints page background, card fills, or hero areas.

rules.name: The True White Rule
rules.body: Body background stays #ffffff or neutral zinc tints — never warm cream/sand/paper tones.

rules.name: The Section Label Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are permitted once per major panel, not as repeated eyebrows across the page.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Borders and background shifts define regions. Shadows stay at shadow-sm maximum — never layered card-on-card elevation.

dos: Do keep body background true white (#ffffff) with cool zinc neutrals for text and borders.
Do use weather amber (#f59e0b) only on icons and small semantic highlights.
Do treat loading, error, empty, and API-offline states as first-class UI with clear copy in PT-BR.
Do verify muted-foreground (#71717a) meets AAA (7:1) against white and card backgrounds.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: replace pulse/spin with static or crossfade alternatives.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS dashboard clichés: cream/warm-neutral body backgrounds, gradient heroes, eyebrow kickers on every section, identical icon+heading+card grids, hero-metric templates.
Don't use typical weather-app theatrics: sky gradients, oversized sun illustrations, cartoon clouds as primary identity.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or glassmorphism-as-default.
Don't nest cards inside cards — one panel level per region.
Don't rely on color alone for API status or errors; pair with text labels.
